game_name: Dungeons & Dragons: Eye of the Beholder

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Players learn party composition mechanics before encountering threats
Grid-based movement and spatial awareness in 3D dungeon space
Combat positioning and ranged/melee tactics against initial threats

element_introduction_order.element: Spell casting and spell user interface
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: AD&D spell mechanics; interface described as awkward by reviewers
Possibility to resurrect skeletons or recruit found NPCs to reach maximum 6-character party
Faction-based enemies as party descends deeper
Escalating enemy difficulty aligned with narrative progression
Reviewers noted more emphasis on puzzles than typical AD&D titles
End-game confrontation after traversing all dungeon layers

typical_relief_triggers: Resource management and healing between threats
typical_tension_triggers: Sudden monster encounters in dungeon corridors
Spatial confinement and resource scarcity in dungeon
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating layered descent with increasing enemy faction difficulty; puzzle-solving interspersed with combat creates variable pacing; reviewers noted the game is unforgiving and challenging

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: NPC locations scattered throughout dungeon allow optional recruitment paths

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory with basic encounters in sewers; players learn party mechanics and combat in lower-threat environment
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating with Dwarf and Drow clan encounters; complexity increases with faction-based enemies and puzzle integration
difficulty_curve.late_game: Unforgiving and challenging; culminates in final confrontation with Xanathar at bottom of dungeon lair
notable_spikes: Transition from sewers to Dwarf clan territory marks first major difficulty increase
Drow clan encounters represent deeper dungeon threat escalation
Xanathar final boss battle represents peak difficulty

notable_level_patterns.description: Game organizes progression as vertical descent through distinct zones: sewers → Dwarf territory → Drow territory → Xanathar's lair. Each layer represents narrative and mechanical progression with escalating enemy factions.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Sewers (entry) → Dwarf Clans → Drow Clans → Xanathar's Lair (final)

notable_level_patterns.description: Unlike typical AD&D titles, Eye of the Beholder emphasizes puzzle-solving integrated with combat encounters throughout the dungeon crawl
Combat encounters interspersed with NPC recruitment opportunities that expand party size and provide narrative reinforcement of progress
